entry.title: Aligning privacy incentives in P2MR
entry.summary: The recent contribution to Bitcoin Improvement Proposal 360 (BIP360) is noteworthy. Antoine Poinsot has submitted a pull request which encompasses the implementation of a suggestion that was initially outlined in an original post. The details of this submission can be viewed through the provided [GitHub link](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/2198). This development is part of ongoing discussions and enhancements being proposed within the Bitcoin developer community. Such contributions are crucial as they help in refining and advancing the frameworks that underpin Bitcoin's functionality and its ecosystem.
